title: Briful 18CM Large Christmas Baubles, 7.1" Xmas Tree Decorations Red Christmas Bauble Decorations Glitter Hanging Ornaments for Home Festival Decor
features: 【Large Xmas Baubles Sets】These Christmas balls are shatterproof and offer you many possibilities to design a festive Christmas decoration. The classic Xmas tree decoration shines in the colors matt, shiny, glitter and swirl. 3 sizes to meet your need of home decor: Φ12cm /Φ15cm /Φ18cm.

【Stunning Christmas Ornaments】While the shiny baubles festively reflect your Christmas lights, the matte version exudes an elegance. At the top of the balls there is a silver eyelet on which you can attach the string hanger. They can then be hung on a Christmas tree, a houseplants or a chandelier.

【Shatterproof Large Baubles】Since it is made of sturdy plastic, the Christmas tree balls are a practical Christmas decoration for both indoor and outdoor use. You can also incorporate the baubles wonderfully as a decoration for Advent in arrangements at Christmas time.

【DIY Christmas Arrangement】You can use these plastic Christmas tree baubles not only as Xmas tree decorations. The plastic balls can be used in a variety of ways as Christmas window decorations or fireplace decor.

【Baubles Package and Size】Ball sizes from 12cm(4.7"), 15cm(5.9") 18cm(7.1") for all kinds of occasions. Pack of 4pcs/2pcs/1pc are available. These large hanging balls are not only real eye-catchers, but can also be used again and again and are also supplied in a practical, reusable plastic box.
